response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but the profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. Database experience centers on MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and there is no Fixed Income or capital-markets systems experience; his fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) was TypeScript/Node-based investment tooling, not trading or fixed-income systems.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering track record at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang, async I/O at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and knowledge sharing
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months, a decade ago) vs. 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain background
